name: Heavenly Microwave Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Place caramels and water in a medium microwave-safe bowl. Microwave on medium-high power for 2 minutes or until the mixture melts, stirring after each minute.
2. Stir in the toasted almonds.
3. Spread the caramel-coated almonds in a single layer on a greased jellyroll pan.
4. Place the chocolate chips and candy coating in another medium microwave-safe bowl. Microwave on medium-high power for 3 minutes or until the mixture melts, stirring after each minute.
5. Pour the melted chocolate mixture over the almonds; spread evenly with the back of a spoon to cover them.
6. Chill until the candy hardens. Break into pieces.
7. Store in an airtight container in a cool place.
